name: Wayfair Inc.
description: Wayfair Inc. is an American multinational e-commerce company headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts, that specializes in selling furniture, home goods, and décor online. Founded in 2002, the company provides a vast selection of millions of items sourced from thousands of global suppliers. Through its technology-driven platform, Wayfair aims to make it easy for shoppers to discover and purchase products for every room in their home, operating across multiple international markets including the United States, Canada, Germany, and the United Kingdom.
